summary: REQ-17/18/19 branding updates appear implemented: header, footer, and Home hero now show the existing Escoffiers wordmark image alongside visible "Escoffiers" text. However, the diff also introduces a "Recruitment" navigation link, which is a navigation structure change not requested and explicitly listed as a non-goal.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/introduced a "Recruitment" navigation link (navigation structure change).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals explicitly include not changing site navigation structure or adding/removing pages; the diff shows a Recruitment link included in header and footer navigation.
